description: Marker 'build_failure:' added at line 5 matches the structural pattern of 3 existing allowlist entries in _clean_rewards (line 8) — all end with ':'. The allowlist was not updated to include the new marker. Unchanged consumer likely drops values carrying this marker.
fix: Either add 'build_failure:' to the allowlist in _clean_rewards, OR document in the spec §2 Current State why the new marker is deliberately out of the consumer's scope.
title: New marker added; same-file consumer allowlist unchanged
